approved_command_preview: Run approved repo script chatgpt_staging/exec_scripts/exec-20260519-wbs04-merge-delete-batch1-export-001.ps1. The script performs a read-only full-row/full-field Airtable export for Work Items, Session Checkpoints, Idea Inbox, Plans, Operator Preferences, Validation Test Cases, and Queue Control. This is batch 1 of 3 for aggressive merge/update/delete-candidate analysis; Delete Queue is intentionally excluded from source tables.
